choices.text: MEO ~20,200 km. 12-hour period. 24 satellites in 6 planes for global coverage. Other GNSS: Galileo, GLONASS, BeiDou similar MEO.
SSO (Sun-Synchronous Orbit) — special ~98° inclination LEO where sun angle is consistent at each equator crossing. Shadows similar in all images → consistent quality. Landsat, Sentinel-2 use this.
